title: CHANGELOG [0.16.0] + npm metadata
description: Cut a dated [0.16.0] CHANGELOG entry covering all features shipped after 0.15.0 (plus the previously-undocumented auto-filter feature), and bump package.json release metadata.
successCriteria: CHANGELOG.md has '## [0.16.0] — 2026-06-04' between an empty '## [Unreleased]' and '## [0.15.0]' (em-dash U+2014 header format preserved).

[0.16.0] ### Added documents: claude-code provider (#21/#24), DeepSeek provider (#21/#24), graph telemetry + update-all (#19/#20), evaluator lens panel (#25/#26), architect lens panel (#27), native lens panel, config-selectable workflow engine (pipeline.engine), auto-filter command filtering (#11/#12, noted as shipped 0.12.0).
[0.16.0] ### Fixed documents the plugin PostToolUse hooks schema fix (#22/#23).
package.json description mentions DeepSeek and Claude Code; keywords includes 'deepseek'.
build verification: `npm run typecheck` passes (package.json still valid).
generatorNotes: Match the existing [0.15.0] bullet style: '- **Lead-in** ([#N](https://github.com/BOBER3r/agent-bober/pull/N)): description.' Keep the empty '## [Unreleased]' header. Do NOT backfill into [0.12.0]; auto-filter goes in [0.16.0] with an inline '(shipped in 0.12.0)' note. package.json: bump version only (0.15.0->0.16.0), append 'DeepSeek' + 'Claude Code' to the description sentence about providers, add 'deepseek' to keywords (claude-code already present).
evaluatorNotes: Verify the header sits between [Unreleased] and [0.15.0]. grep the [0.16.0] block for each PR number (#17 must NOT be re-listed — it belongs to 0.15.0). Confirm package.json parses and version is exactly 0.16.0. Confirm 'deepseek' in keywords and 'DeepSeek'/'Claude Code' in description.
